requirement_topic.en: AC Charging Connector — SAE J1772 Type 1 (Japan domestic AC standard)
requirement_topic.zh: 交流充电接口——SAE J1772 Type 1（日本国内交流标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 交流充電接口——SAE J1772 Type 1（日本國內交流標準）

summary.en: AC charging in Japan (Mode 2 / Mode 3) uses the SAE J1772 Type 1 connector, a 5-pin single-phase AC coupler rated up to 32 A / 240 V (approximately 7.7 kW single-phase). This is physically standardised for the Japanese market and is distinct from the European IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (7-pin) and the Chinese GB/T 20234.2 (7-pin) connectors. The SAE J1772 Type 1 inlet is fitted to virtually all EVs sold in Japan for AC charging. Japan has not mandated a specific connector standard in the same form as the EU's AFIR, but the J1772 Type 1 format is the de-facto universal AC charging standard across all major Japanese EV charging networks (e.g., CHAdeMO-affiliated network, convenience store chargers). The connector body, pin arrangement, locking mechanism, and pilot signal (CP) implementation follow SAE J1772.
summary.zh: 日本交流充电（模式2/模式3）采用SAE J1772 Type 1接口，为5针单相交流耦合器，额定电流最高32A/240V（约7.7kW单相）。该接口在日本市场已实现物理标准化，与欧洲IEC 62196-2 Type 2（7针）和中国GB/T 20234.2（7针）接口均不兼容。SAE J1772 Type 1充电口几乎装配于日本市场所有电动汽车上。日本尚未以与欧盟AFIR相同形式强制规定连接器标准，但J1772 Type 1格式已成为日本所有主要充电网络（如CHAdeMO旗下网络、便利店充电站等）的事实通用交流充电标准。接口外形、针脚排列、锁定机构及导引信号（CP）实施均遵循SAE J1772规范。
summary.zht: 日本交流充電（模式2/模式3）採用SAE J1772 Type 1接口，為5針單相交流耦合器，額定電流最高32A/240V（約7.7kW單相）。該接口在日本市場已實現物理標準化，與歐洲IEC 62196-2 Type 2（7針）和中國GB/T 20234.2（7針）接口均不相容。SAE J1772 Type 1充電口幾乎裝配於日本市場所有電動汽車上。日本尚未以與歐盟AFIR相同形式強制規定連接器標準，但J1772 Type 1格式已成為日本所有主要充電網絡（如CHAdeMO旗下網絡、便利店充電站等）的事實通用交流充電標準。接口外形、針腳排列、鎖定機構及導引信號（CP）實施均遵循SAE J1772規範。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — SAE Electric Vehicle and Plug-In Hybrid Electric Vehicle Conductive Charge Coupler (SAE International, current edition; Type 1 single-phase used in Japan)
JIS C 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (IDT IEC 61851-1; governs Mode 2/3 AC charging system requirements in Japan)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2-2015 (and its 2023 revision) for AC charging connectors. This is a 7-pin single-phase AC coupler that is physically distinct from the Japanese SAE J1772 Type 1 5-pin connector. The pin count, body shape, locking mechanism, and pilot signal implementation all differ. The two connectors are mechanically and electrically incompatible — a GB/T 20234.2 plug cannot physically mate with a J1772 Type 1 socket and vice versa. No mutual recognition agreement exists between China's GB/T 20234.2 and the SAE J1772 Type 1 standard.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电接口采用GB/T 20234.2-2015（及其2023年修订版）。该标准定义了7针单相交流耦合器，与日本SAE J1772 Type 1的5针接口在物理上截然不同。针脚数量、接口外形、锁定机构及导引信号实施均不相同。两种接口在机械和电气层面均不兼容——GB/T 20234.2插头无法与J1772 Type 1插座物理对接，反之亦然。中国GB/T 20234.2与SAE J1772 Type 1之间不存在互认协议。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電接口採用GB/T 20234.2-2015（及其2023年修訂版）。該標準定義了7針單相交流耦合器，與日本SAE J1772 Type 1的5針接口在物理上截然不同。針腳數量、接口外形、鎖定機構及導引信號實施均不相同。兩種接口在機械和電氣層面均不相容——GB/T 20234.2插頭無法與J1772 Type 1插座物理對接，反之亦然。中國GB/T 20234.2與SAE J1772 Type 1之間不存在互認協議。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler (China; physical and signal incompatibility with SAE J1772 Type 1)
GB/T 20234.2-2023 — Revised edition of the AC charging coupler standard (China; updated ratings but maintains physical GB/T 20234.2 form factor, incompatible with J1772 Type 1)

gap.en: The AC charging connector is physically incompatible: Japan requires SAE J1772 Type 1 (5-pin), while Chinese EVSE is built to GB/T 20234.2 (7-pin). A Chinese EV charger equipped with a GB/T 20234.2 cable cannot charge a Japanese EV (J1772 Type 1 inlet) without a full cable assembly and connector replacement. Similarly, a Chinese EV exported to Japan cannot charge at Japanese AC stations without replacing the vehicle inlet to J1772 Type 1. Note also that Japan operates at 100 V / 200 V single-phase (50 Hz in eastern Japan, 60 Hz in western Japan), whereas Chinese residential EVSE is designed for 220 V / 50 Hz — hardware adaptation of the power supply section is required in addition to the connector change. No adapter is commercially sanctioned for public infrastructure use. [Uncertain: METI has not published a specific statutory connector mandate in the same form as EU AFIR; J1772 Type 1 prevalence is based on industry practice and JIS/CHAdeMO network deployment. Verify current METI/CHAdeMO guidance for any updates.]
gap.zh: 交流充电接口物理不兼容：日本要求采用SAE J1772 Type 1（5针），而中国EVSE采用GB/T 20234.2（7针）。配备GB/T 20234.2线缆的中国充电设备在未更换线缆组件和接口的情况下，无法为日本电动汽车（J1772 Type 1充电口）充电。同样，出口至日本的中国电动汽车在未将车辆充电口更换为J1772 Type 1的情况下，无法在日本交流充电站充电。此外，日本采用100V/200V单相供电（日本东部50Hz，西部60Hz），而中国住宅EVSE设计为220V/50Hz——除更换接口外，还须对电源部分进行硬件适配。公共基础设施使用转接头不受商业认可。【不确定事项：METI尚未以与欧盟AFIR相同形式颁布具体法定连接器要求；J1772 Type 1的普及性基于行业实践及JIS/CHAdeMO网络部署。请核实METI/CHAdeMO最新指引。】
gap.zht: 交流充電接口物理不相容：日本要求採用SAE J1772 Type 1（5針），而中國EVSE採用GB/T 20234.2（7針）。配備GB/T 20234.2線纜的中國充電設備在未更換線纜組件和接口的情況下，無法為日本電動汽車（J1772 Type 1充電口）充電。同樣，出口至日本的中國電動汽車在未將車輛充電口更換為J1772 Type 1的情況下，無法在日本交流充電站充電。此外，日本採用100V/200V單相供電（日本東部50Hz，西部60Hz），而中國住宅EVSE設計為220V/50Hz——除更換接口外，還須對電源部分進行硬件適配。公共基礎設施使用轉接頭不受商業認可。【不確定事項：METI尚未以與歐盟AFIR相同形式頒布具體法定連接器要求；J1772 Type 1的普及性基於行業實踐及JIS/CHAdeMO網絡部署。請核實METI/CHAdeMO最新指引。】

mandatory_status.target: De-facto mandatory — SAE J1772 Type 1 is the universal AC charging connector standard in Japan across all major public charging networks; no statutory connector mandate equivalent to EU AFIR has been identified, but market access without J1772 Type 1 compatibility is impractical [verify with METI]
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 20234.2 compliance required for EV sold in China (enforced via MIIT type-approval)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The AC charging connector is a hard hardware incompatibility: SAE J1772 Type 1 (Japan) vs. GB/T 20234.2 (China). A full connector and cable assembly replacement is required before a Chinese EVSE unit can serve Japan's EV fleet. Grid voltage adaptation (100/200 V Japan vs. 220 V China) compounds the hardware gap. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】交流充电接口存在硬件物理不兼容问题：日本采用SAE J1772 Type 1，中国采用GB/T 20234.2。中国EVSE设备须完全更换接口和线缆组件，方能服务于日本电动汽车。电网电压适配（日本100/200V与中国220V）进一步加剧了硬件差距。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】交流充電接口存在硬件物理不相容問題：日本採用SAE J1772 Type 1，中國採用GB/T 20234.2。中國EVSE設備須完全更換接口和線纜組件，方能服務於日本電動汽車。電網電壓適配（日本100/200V與中國220V）進一步加劇了硬件差距。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。

requirement_topic.en: DC Fast-Charging Connector — CHAdeMO and Protocol (GB/T 27930 vs. CHAdeMO CAN)
requirement_topic.zh: 直流快充接口——CHAdeMO与通信协议（GB/T 27930与CHAdeMO CAN的对比）
requirement_topic.zht: 直流快充接口——CHAdeMO與通訊協定（GB/T 27930與CHAdeMO CAN的對比）

summary.en: DC fast charging in Japan is predominantly based on the CHAdeMO standard, developed and maintained by the CHAdeMO Association (a body formed by Japanese automakers and utilities). The CHAdeMO connector is a dedicated DC fast-charging coupler with a proprietary body geometry and a CAN-bus-based communication protocol defined by the CHAdeMO specification. CHAdeMO Version 1.x supports up to 62.5 kW (500 V / 125 A); CHAdeMO Version 2.0 (also called ChaoJi in its next-generation form, co-developed with China's GB/T) supports up to 900 V / 500 A (450 kW). However, as of 2026, the majority of deployed Japanese DC fast chargers and EVs use CHAdeMO Version 1.x connectors. CHAdeMO is the dominant DC fast-charging standard in Japan and is physically and protocol-wise distinct from both the Chinese GB/T 20234.3 and the European CCS Combo 2. Compliance with the CHAdeMO specification is required for interoperability with Japan's DC charging network.
summary.zh: 日本直流快充主要基于CHAdeMO标准，该标准由CHAdeMO协议会（由日本汽车制造商及电力公司共同创立的机构）开发并维护。CHAdeMO接口为专用直流快充耦合器，采用专有接口外形及基于CAN总线的通信协议（由CHAdeMO规范定义）。CHAdeMO 1.x版本支持最高62.5kW（500V/125A）；CHAdeMO 2.0版本（即下一代ChaoJi形式，与中国GB/T联合开发）支持最高900V/500A（450kW）。然而截至2026年，日本大多数已部署的直流快充站及电动汽车仍采用CHAdeMO 1.x接口。CHAdeMO是日本占主导地位的直流快充标准，在物理层面和协议层面均与中国GB/T 20234.3及欧洲CCS Combo 2存在明显区别。与日本直流充电网络实现互操作须符合CHAdeMO规范。
summary.zht: 日本直流快充主要基於CHAdeMO標準，該標準由CHAdeMO協議會（由日本汽車製造商及電力公司共同創立的機構）開發並維護。CHAdeMO接口為專用直流快充耦合器，採用專有接口外形及基於CAN總線的通訊協定（由CHAdeMO規範定義）。CHAdeMO 1.x版本支持最高62.5kW（500V/125A）；CHAdeMO 2.0版本（即下一代ChaoJi形式，與中國GB/T聯合開發）支持最高900V/500A（450kW）。然而截至2026年，日本大多數已部署的直流快充站及電動汽車仍採用CHAdeMO 1.x接口。CHAdeMO是日本佔主導地位的直流快充標準，在物理層面和協定層面均與中國GB/T 20234.3及歐洲CCS Combo 2存在明顯區別。與日本直流充電網絡實現互操作須符合CHAdeMO規範。

standards_or_laws: CHAdeMO Association — CHAdeMO Protocol Specification v1.2 / v2.0 (CAN-bus based DC fast-charging; connector geometry and communication protocol defined by CHAdeMO Association)
JIS C 61851-23 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (IDT IEC 61851-23; system-level DC charging safety requirements in Japan)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a d.c. EV charging station and an electric vehicle for control of d.c. charging (IEC standard referenced by CHAdeMO for DC communication requirements)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.3 (DC charging coupler — 9-pin DC connector) and GB/T 27930 (CAN-bus-based communication protocol between off-board charger and BMS) for DC fast charging. Although both CHAdeMO and GB/T 27930 use CAN bus as the physical communication layer, the higher-level protocol messages, data formats, and timing are defined differently by CHAdeMO and GB/T 27930 — they are not interoperable at the protocol level. The connector body geometry and pin assignment of GB/T 20234.3 are also physically incompatible with CHAdeMO. Note: ChaoJi (CHAdeMO 2.0 / GB/T next-generation) is a joint CN-JP development that provides a common future connector and protocol, but it is not yet widely deployed as of 2026 and does not resolve the existing CHAdeMO 1.x installed-base incompatibility.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3（直流充电耦合器——9针直流接口）和GB/T 27930（非车载充电设备与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线通信协议）。尽管CHAdeMO和GB/T 27930均采用CAN总线作为物理通信层，但上层协议消息、数据格式和时序由CHAdeMO和GB/T 27930分别定义，协议层面不可互操作。GB/T 20234.3的接口外形与针脚分配也与CHAdeMO存在物理不兼容。注意：ChaoJi（CHAdeMO 2.0 / GB/T下一代接口）为中日联合开发，提供统一的下一代接口和协议，但截至2026年尚未广泛部署，且无法解决现有CHAdeMO 1.x已安装基础的不兼容问题。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3（直流充電耦合器——9針直流接口）和GB/T 27930（非車載充電設備與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線通訊協定）。儘管CHAdeMO和GB/T 27930均採用CAN總線作為物理通訊層，但上層協定訊息、數據格式和時序由CHAdeMO和GB/T 27930分別定義，協定層面不可互操作。GB/T 20234.3的接口外形與針腳分配也與CHAdeMO存在物理不相容。注意：ChaoJi（CHAdeMO 2.0 / GB/T下一代接口）為中日聯合開發，提供統一的下一代接口和協定，但截至2026年尚未廣泛部署，且無法解決現有CHAdeMO 1.x已安裝基礎的不相容問題。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler (China; physical incompatibility with CHAdeMO connector body)
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Revised edition of DC charging coupler (China; supports up to 1500 V / 800 A; same GB/T body form factor, physically incompatible with CHAdeMO 1.x)
GB/T 27930-2015 — Communication protocol between off-board conductive charger and battery management system (CAN-bus; protocol-level incompatibility with CHAdeMO despite shared CAN physical layer)

gap.en: Two-layer incompatibility exists between Chinese DC fast-charging equipment and Japan's CHAdeMO standard: (1) Physical connector gap — GB/T 20234.3 and CHAdeMO use different connector body geometries, pin assignments, and locking mechanisms; a Chinese DC station cannot physically connect to a CHAdeMO-inlet EV without a hardware redesign of the connector assembly; (2) Protocol gap — GB/T 27930 (CAN-bus, Chinese message set) and CHAdeMO protocol (CAN-bus, CHAdeMO message set) share the CAN physical layer but are incompatible at the application layer; a Chinese charger's communication firmware cannot negotiate a charging session with a CHAdeMO-equipped EV without a complete firmware re-implementation. Note: The ChaoJi next-generation connector (CHAdeMO 2.0 / GB/T joint spec) may eventually bridge this gap, but deployed CHAdeMO 1.x infrastructure in Japan still requires the legacy CHAdeMO connector and protocol as of 2026. [Uncertain: ChaoJi deployment timelines in Japan — verify with CHAdeMO Association for current network rollout status.]
gap.zh: 中国直流快充设备与日本CHAdeMO标准之间存在双重不兼容问题：（1）物理接口差距——GB/T 20234.3与CHAdeMO采用不同的接口外形、针脚分配及锁定机构；在未对接口组件进行硬件重新设计的情况下，中国直流充电站无法与搭载CHAdeMO充电口的电动汽车实现物理对接；（2）协议差距——GB/T 27930（CAN总线，中国消息集）与CHAdeMO协议（CAN总线，CHAdeMO消息集）共享CAN物理层，但在应用层不兼容；中国充电设备的通信固件在未进行完整固件重新实现的情况下，无法与搭载CHAdeMO设备的电动汽车协商充电会话。注意：下一代ChaoJi接口（CHAdeMO 2.0 / GB/T联合规范）最终或可弥合这一差距，但截至2026年日本已部署的CHAdeMO 1.x基础设施仍需采用传统CHAdeMO接口和协议。【不确定事项：ChaoJi在日本的部署时间表——请向CHAdeMO协议会核实最新网络推广状态。】
gap.zht: 中國直流快充設備與日本CHAdeMO標準之間存在雙重不相容問題：（1）物理接口差距——GB/T 20234.3與CHAdeMO採用不同的接口外形、針腳分配及鎖定機構；在未對接口組件進行硬件重新設計的情況下，中國直流充電站無法與搭載CHAdeMO充電口的電動汽車實現物理對接；（2）協定差距——GB/T 27930（CAN總線，中國消息集）與CHAdeMO協定（CAN總線，CHAdeMO消息集）共享CAN物理層，但在應用層不相容；中國充電設備的通訊固件在未進行完整固件重新實現的情況下，無法與搭載CHAdeMO設備的電動汽車協商充電會話。注意：下一代ChaoJi接口（CHAdeMO 2.0 / GB/T聯合規範）最終或可彌合這一差距，但截至2026年日本已部署的CHAdeMO 1.x基礎設施仍需採用傳統CHAdeMO接口和協定。【不確定事項：ChaoJi在日本的部署時間表——請向CHAdeMO協議會核實最新網絡推廣狀態。】

mandatory_status.target: De-facto mandatory for DC fast charging in Japan — CHAdeMO is the dominant DC standard required for interoperability with the installed Japanese EV fleet and public charging network; CHAdeMO membership and protocol licence required for EVSE manufacturers [verify current licensing requirements with CHAdeMO Association]
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 20234.3 and GB/T 27930 compliance required for DC fast-charge EVSE sold in China (enforced via MIIT type-approval and CCC from 1 March 2025)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC fast-charging equipment from China is physically and protocol-incompatible with Japan's CHAdeMO standard. A two-layer redesign — connector hardware and communication firmware — is required before China-origin DC EVSE can serve the Japanese market. The ChaoJi next-generation connector may offer a future path but does not resolve existing CHAdeMO 1.x compatibility requirements. This comparison is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】中国直流快充设备与日本CHAdeMO标准存在物理和协议双重不兼容。中国产直流EVSE进入日本市场前，须进行接口硬件和通信固件两层重新设计。ChaoJi下一代接口或提供未来路径，但无法解决现有CHAdeMO 1.x兼容性要求。本比较仅供参考，不构成法律或监管建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】中國直流快充設備與日本CHAdeMO標準存在物理和協定雙重不相容。中國產直流EVSE進入日本市場前，須進行接口硬件和通訊固件兩層重新設計。ChaoJi下一代接口或提供未來路徑，但無法解決現有CHAdeMO 1.x相容性要求。本比較僅供參考，不構成法律或監管建議。
